message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.5 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0) across fnp crates

Picks up v0.3.0 (2500+ commits since 0.2.9) for both the optional
runtime integration and the conformance harness, matching the rest of
the franken-* ecosystem migrating off 0.2.x in this release wave.

- crates/fnp-runtime/Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.5",
  default-features = false, optional = true }` → `{ version = "0.3.0",
  default-features = false, optional = true }`.
- crates/fnp-conformance/Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.5" }`
  → `{ version = "0.3.0" }`.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update` to resolve asupersync 0.3.0.
